data.acceptance:
1. processNormalizedEvent in src/lib/agent-session-runtime-events.ts cancels the input-close timer ONLY
   when state.resultObserved is false. Comment names this knot ID and the failure mode.

2. doTurn in src/lib/opencode-http-session.ts does NOT call emitErrorResult on the
   \"http_message_request_failed\" path. emitErrorResult is preserved on the \"http_session_not_ready\"
   path (we genuinely never sent the prompt; SSE will never deliver completion).

3. Six hermetic unit tests pass:
   a. processNormalizedEvent skips doCancelInputClose when resultObserved=true
   b. processNormalizedEvent calls doCancelInputClose when resultObserved=false
   c. resetForNewTurn restores resultObserved=false (cancellation re-engages)
   d. Regression: session.idle turn_ended + post-idle event within 2s → close timer still active
   e. doTurn HTTP-POST-returns-null path does NOT emit step_finish reason=error
   f. doTurn http_session_not_ready path DOES emit step_finish reason=error

4. \`bun run lint\` passes with zero errors and zero new warnings.

5. \`bunx tsc --noEmit\` passes with zero errors.

6. \`bun run test\` passes (new tests + existing suite).

7. \`bun run build\` succeeds.

8. Changed files respect CLAUDE.md limits: 500 lines/file, 100 lines/function, 100 cols/line.

9. No new uses of state-name string-pattern matching, no silent fallbacks (\`?? \"default\"\`), no
   workflow post-processing in TS — per the standing CLAUDE.md rules.
